description.value: A blast of cold air erupts from your hands. All creatures in a 60-foot cone take [[/damage 40 type=cold]] damage. Each target takes the full listed damage and makes their own save.

system.targetingSuccessScaling:
- 0 = Fails
- 1 = Half damage (20)
- 2 = Full damage (40)
- 3 = Enhanced damage (48)  + Slowed
system.weavingRoll: Water Potential + Water Mastery + Space Potential + Space Mastery
